title: OPPO Find X9 Pro - 512 GB, Silk White
overview:
Step up your photography game with the OPPO Find X9 Pro. It's got a quad camera system on the back that always lets you get the perfect frame. The 200 MP telephoto camera's got a 120x super zoom for long distance shots. Even after sunset, the True Night Photography System will make your pics look awesome. The Full HD+ screen has a 120 Hz refresh rate and striking colours to make everything you watch smooth and vibrant. Plus, the massive 7500 mAh battery will keep you going all day long. No charger anxiety here.

Good to know

- The camera system was co-developed with legendary camera maker Hasselblad, to make sure that the captured colours are true to life
- Powered by the top tier MediaTek 9500 processor, you'll get a smooth and fast experience when you're streaming, texting or scrolling
- Your selfies and video calls will be super sharp thanks to the 50 MP front facing camera
- The Find X9 can record stunningly clear 4K 120 FPS Dolby Vision video – perfect for holiday memories
- Need help writing an email or summarising a call? OPPO's advanced AI can do all that and much more
- With 80W SuperVOOC charging you'll have your empty battery topped up in a jiffy (adapter sold separately)

title: OPPO A6x - 128 GB, Ice Blue
overview:
The OPPO A6x gives you a whole lot of screen to play with. Its vibrant 6.75" HD+ display makes everything from scrolling socials to binge-watching feel easy on the eyes. And with a silky-smooth 120 Hz refresh rate, every swipe glides right along with your finger. Under the hood, the Snapdragon 685 chipset keeps things ticking along nicely. Apps pop open quickly and multitasking feels refreshingly stress-free. The 13 MP main camera is great for casual snaps, and Night Mode helps pull in more detail when the lights dip. And the 5 MP front camera has you covered for selfies and catch-ups with friends.

Good to know

- The 6100 mAh battery gives you long-lasting power for busy days
- Outdoor Mode 2.0 boosts brightness in sunlight so the screen stays clear
- Its IP64 rating helps guard against dust and splashes
- AI GameBoost 2.0 keeps gameplay smooth and stable
- AI LinkBoost 3.0 improves your connection in weak-signal areas

title: OPPO Reno13 5G - 256 GB, Luminous Blue
overview:
The OPPO Reno13 is built for adventure. Its triple camera system with a 50 MP main lens snaps pics that are full of life and colour. There's also a bunch of AI editing tools to take them to the next level. Remove photobombers, move people around and swap backgrounds like magic. Its IP69 rating means it's super durable, so it's perfect if you love your outdoor activities. And everything will look incredible on the 6.59” AMOLED display. Get out there and make some memories.

Good to know

- The MediaTek Dimensity 8350 processor is powerful and efficient for a snappy all-day performance
- Its large 5,600 mAh battery means you can go all day without reaching for the charger
- The aerospace-grade aluminium design adds a premium feel and extra toughness
- Your selfies and video calls will be super sharp thanks to its 50 MP front facing camera
- With 256 GB of storage, you've got plenty of space for your games, photos and apps

overview:
Take your photography to the next level with the Reno13 Pro. With its triple camera system and a 50 MP main lens, your photos will pop with colour and detail. To make them just perfect, there's the AI editor. It can unblur face, remove reflections, boost detail and more.  Everything you create will look amazing on the 6.83" OLED display. - Apps, games and everything else will run like clockwork thanks to the octa-core MediaTek processor

title: OPPO Find X9 Ultra - 512 GB, Tundra Umber
overview:
Step up your photography with the OPPO Find X9 Ultra. Created in partnership with Hasselblad, it's designed for anyone who wants more control and creativity from their smartphone camera. Dual 200 MP rear sensors capture rich detail and accurate colours, even in low light, while a 50 MP telephoto camera with 10x optical zoom helps you frame distant subjects with confidence. And the vibrant Quad HD+ display shows off your photos and videos beautifully.

Good to know

- Its Qualcomm Snapdragon 8 Elite processor keeps multitasking smooth
- 8K video recording at 30 fps captures ultra-detailed, future-ready footage
- The 50 MP front-facing camera gives you sharp selfies and clear video calls
- OPPO AI features help with everyday tasks like writing emails or summarising calls
- 7050 mAh battery supports all-day use without constant recharging
